raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A dresser with closed drawers is visible. A white bowl and a blue can are on the dresser top. The top drawer is closed. The drawer has a front panel with a handle. STRATEGY - To open the drawer, first reach for the handle, then grasp it, and pull the drawer forward. Failure modes include not grasping the handle properly or pulling with insufficient force. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer handle for contact; Step 2 grasp the handle for a secure grip; Step 3 pull the drawer forward to open it.

Goal: open(dresser_top_drawer)
Scene: dresser, drawer, bowl, can
Step 1: reach(dresser_top_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the dresser top drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, drawer_handle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, drawer_handle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(dresser_top_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the dresser top drawer
  contact: holding(drawer_handle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(drawer_handle)
Step 3: pull(dresser_top_drawer)
  affordance_region: the front panel of the dresser top drawer
  contact: holding(drawer_handle) [progress]
  spatial: distance(drawer_handle, dresser_edge, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(drawer_handle, dresser_edge) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the handle of the dresser top drawer
the handle of the dresser top drawer
the front panel of the dresser top drawer
